title: AT&T's Build-A-Plan lets you pick and choose what you need and how much you pay
description: Today AT&T is announcing "a fully customizable wireless experience" which lets you control what you pay for. It's called Build-A-Plan and will be available from May 27 online only. It's a 30-day rolling subscription. If you're interested, there's a $15 per month base plan which includes unlimited talk and text as well as 1GB of data. Then you simply add what you need on top: 5GB of data for $5, 15GB for $10, unlimited data for $20 with SD streaming (2Mbps on 5G, 1.5Mbps elsewhere), and $35 for unlimited data with UHD streaming (this isn't capped, you get the maximum possible speed at any...

title: iPhone 19 Pro prototypes are being tested with quad-curved screens, new rumor says
description: Apple's iPhone 19 Pro and iPhone 19 Pro Max prototypes are currently undergoing testing with quad-curved screens, according to a new rumor from the prolific Chinese leaker who goes by Digital Chat Station on Weibo. We have heard back in April that Apple's 2027 Pro series would employ such panels, which is a bit ironic seeing as how quad-curved screens used to be all the rage with Chinese Android smartphone makers, until they all decided to copy Apple and go the flat route. So get ready for a new influx of quad-curved panels in Android flagships in late 2027 and 2028. In 2027 Apple...

title: Infinix details Hot 70 design
description: The Infinix Hot 70 is already official in Bangladesh, and ahead of its global announcement on May 25, the brand shared some details regarding the design of the phone and the rest of the Hot 70 series. Infinix Hot 70 series colors Infinix is ready to bring various looks, and the Hot 70 series will be available in a total of 12 colors. Infinix Hot 70 color options The Thermo Orange colorway, in particular, will feature a neat color-shifting trick up its sleeve, with the ability to change colors when exposed to extreme cold and heat. The phone will offer a light orange shade out...

title: Samsung Galaxy S27 Pro camera details leak
description: Back in April rumors started going around saying Samsung would be adding a fourth member to its Galaxy S27 family, and yesterday a new rumor told us what screen size the Galaxy S27 Pro would have. Today yet another rumor is talking about its cameras. Based on the previous rumors, we were under the impression that the S27 Pro would be an S27 Ultra without an S Pen and smaller in size. However, this new rumor contradicts that, saying the Pro and Ultra will have a different telephoto camera. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra The Galaxy S27 Ultra is rumored to only have three cameras on the...

title: Android 17 comes with a more convenient media app switcher
description: Google released Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 just a couple of days ago, and it comes with some changes to the UI. One notable update is the media app switcher - it's no longer a carousel. New media app switcher in Android 17 While Android 16's current media app switcher that shows up in the notification shade requires you to swipe left and right to switch between active media apps, Android 17 will bring a new, more convenient and obvious switching style. In the new UI, Android minimizes the other media apps into tiny cards that expand when you tap on them. This makes it not just...

title: Oura Ring 5 launch date leaks and it's next week
description: Back in March, the upcoming Oura Ring 5 leaked in renders showcasing a new design, and now on Reddit someone posted a purported internal document from the company which reveals when the device will be launching. The date is May 28, which is also when pre-orders will open. The ring will start shipping on June 4. As you can see, the document includes a photo of the ring and the charging case, and these match the leaked images from March, basically confirming the redesign (as much as any rumored bit of info can, of course). The Oura Ring 5 will be smaller and more comfortable than its...

title: Xiaomi 17 Max arrives with 200MP main cam and 8,000 mAh Si-C battery
description: The fourth member in the Xiaomi 17 series is here, and it brings the Max moniker. The Xiaomi 17 Max is the less flashy sibling of the 17 Pro Max, omitting the secondary rear screen and opting for a higher resolution 200MP main cam while also housing a larger 8,000 mAh Si/C battery. According to Xiaomi, the 17 Max should be good for over 2 days of normal usage with the battery rated to retain up to 80% of its charge even after 1,600 charging cycles, which is over 4 years of daily usage. When you do need to recharge, you can do so at up to 100W speeds via cable and 50W wirelessly. The 17...

title: Samsung union suspends planned strike after new round of negotiations
description: Samsung was facing the biggest strike in its history in its Device Solutions business, thanks to it posting record sales but not sharing much the profits with its employees. Now, however, the labor union suspended its planned 18-day strike, following a round of negotiations led by South Korea's minister for labor and employment. These talks resulted in a tentative agreement. Now all members of the union will vote, from May 22 to May 27, on whether to accept the tentative agreement that was proposed. Samsung would allocate a special bonus equivalent to 10.5% of operating profits to its chip...

title: Oppo Reno16 series camera details revealed ahead of launch
description: Oppo has revealed more details about the upcoming Reno16 series ahead of its launch in China. The Reno16 and Reno16 Pro are already up for pre-order in the country, and the company has previously showcased their designs. The company has now shared the camera specifications of the smartphones. The Reno16 series will offer a triple rear camera setup with a primary 200MP sensor. It will also feature a 50MP periscope telephoto camera and a 50MP ultrawide unit. At the front, the phones will offer a 50MP ultrawide selfie camera as well. While Oppo hasn’t detailed the exact sensors used...

title: HMD Vibe 2 5G goes official with a 6.75-inch screen, 6,000mAh battery
description: After several teasers, HMD has officially launched the Vibe 2 5G in India. The smartphone arrives as the successor to the HMD Vibe, which debuted in September 2025, and brings several upgrades, including a larger battery. The Vibe 2 5G sports a 6.75-inch LCD display that offers an HD+ resolution and a refresh rate of 120Hz. It is powered by the Unisoc T8200 chipset, which can be paired with up to 6GB of RAM and 128GB of internal storage. The phone offers a microSD card slot for storage expansion up to 1TB. In terms of optics, the handset gets a 50MP primary rear camera and an...

title: Oppo Find X9 Ultra and Find X9s launched in India
description: As promised, Oppo today launched the Find X9s and Find X9 Ultra in India, with the latter becoming Oppo's first Ultra smartphone to launch in the country. The Oppo Find X9 Ultra comes in a lone 12GB/512GB configuration, priced at INR169,999. In comparison, the vivo X300 Ultra, launched in India earlier this month, is available in a 16GB/512GB configuration for INR159,999. [#InlinePriceWidget,14388,1#] The Find X9 Ultra will be available in Tundra Umber and Canyon Orange colors in India starting May 28 via Oppo's Indian website, Amazon.in, Flipkart, and mainline retail...

title: Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 and S11 Ultra receive One UI 8.5 stable update, rollout for S23 series expands to more regions
description: Samsung has released the One UI 8.5 stable update for the Galaxy Tab S11 and Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra, making them the first tablets to be upgraded to stable One UI 8.5. [#InlinePriceWidget,14057,1#] The One UI 8.5 stable update for the Galaxy Tab S11 comes with firmware version X736NKOU5BZE3, while the update for the Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra has firmware version X936NKOU5BZE3. [#InlinePriceWidget,14058,1#] The One UI 8.5 stable update for both tablets is currently rolling out in South Korea, but the rollout should expand to other markets soon. Samsung Galaxy Tab S11...

title: Honor Win Turbo to be unveiled on May 29, key specs leaked
description: Honor began teasing the upcoming Win Turbo smartphone last week, and the company has now confirmed its launch date. It has also revealed the design of the handset, while a tipster has shared several key specifications ahead of launch. The Honor Win Turbo will be unveiled in China on May 29, the company confirmed in a Weibo post. Alongside confirming the launch date, the teaser also showcased the phone’s rear design and color options. The handset is also available for pre-order in China and is being offered in three color options including Black and white. The Win Turbo will have...

title: OnePlus Nord 6 just got more expensive
description: OnePlus launched the Nord 6 in India in early April, priced at INR 38,999 ($403) with 8GB of RAM and 256GB of storage, and INR 41,999 ($434) with 12GB of RAM and 256GB of storage. [#InlinePriceWidget,14558,1#] Now, however, the company has implemented a price hike for both options. The entry-level model is now INR 41,999 ($434), while the top of the line variant goes for INR 46,999 ($486). That said, OnePlus still offers an up to INR 2,000 ($20) instant discount on EMI transactions for customers of certain banks. The company hasn't officially communicated any reason for this...

title: Samsung starts testing One UI 9 for the Galaxy S26 FE
description: Samsung has now started testing the upcoming One UI 9 on the Galaxy S26 FE, according to a usually reliable tipster on X. The first build is identified as S741NKSU0AZE5, and the Korean S26 FE's model number is now confirmed to be SM-S741N. The fact that Samsung is testing One UI 9 on this device means it will be launching with that version of the company's skin out of the box. And that in turn means the Galaxy S26 FE will not come out sooner than the Galaxy Z Fold8 and Flip8, which will mark the debut of One UI 9 when they get announced on July 22. Samsung Galaxy S25 FE This, of...

title: HMD Thunder Pro specs and images leak
description: A new HMD smartphone is on the way, according to a reliable account on X that has leaked HMD-related information in the past. It's going to be called HMD Thunder Pro when it lands. It has a 6.67-inch OLED screen with FHD+ resolution and 90Hz refresh rate, a 50MP main camera with OIS, an 8MP ultrawide, a 50MP front camera, and a 6,000 mAh battery with support for 20W wired charging. It's powered by the Unsioc T620 SoC, paired with 8GB of RAM and 256GB of UFS 2.2 storage. The phone supports NFC and has a 3.5mm headphone jack, two mics, two speakers, and an IP65 rating for dust and...

title: Poco Pad C1 launches with familiar specs
description: Xiaomi has just listed a new Poco tablet on its global website, silently launching it in the process. Ladies and gentlemen, meet the Poco Pad C1. If its specs sound familiar, that's not a coincidence, for this is a rebranded Redmi Pad 2 9.7. That device was released last month, and now the Poco version is on its way. Like the Redmi Pad 2 9.7, the Poco Pad C1 has a 9.7-inch LCD screen with 2048x1280 resolution, 120Hz refresh rate, 180Hz touch sampling rate, and 600-nit peak brightness, the Snapdragon 6s 4G Gen 2 chipset at the helm, 4/6GB of RAM, 64/128GB of storage, an 8MP rear camera,...

title: Infinix Hot 70 listed early with a Helio G100 Ultimate SoC, a 6,000mAh battery
description: Infinix recently confirmed that the Hot 70 series will make its global debut on May 25. However, the company appears to have already launched the base Infinix Hot 70 in Bangladesh, where the handset is currently available for purchase through both online and offline retailers. The Infinix Hot 70 is powered by the MediaTek Helio G100 Ultimate chipset, paired with up to 8GB of RAM and 128GB of onboard storage. The handset also includes a microSD card slot for expandable storage. It features a 6.78-inch LCD with HD+ resolution and a 120Hz refresh rate. The device also has an IP64...

title: Samsung Galaxy S27 Pro screen size leaks
description: Back in early April, a rumor from Korea claimed next year's Galaxy S27 family will comprise four members, one more than we're used to. The extra device would allegedly be called Galaxy S27 Pro, but some important details about it weren't outed at that point. Today, the exact same source is back with a very important piece of the puzzle: the new device's size. The S27 Pro allegedly has a 6.47-inch screen. Samsung Galaxy S26+ That places it right in between the Galaxy S27 and S27+, size-wise (assuming they will have similar screens to their predecessors, of course). The Galaxy S27...

title: iQOO Pad6 Pro is here with 4K screen, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC
description: Today iQOO didn't just unveil the 15T smartphone, but also the Pad6 Pro tablet. This is a rebranded vivo Pad6 Pro, which got official at the end of March. Like the vivo then, it has a 13.2-inch LCD screen with 3840x2512 resolution, 144Hz refresh rate, and 540Hz touch sampling rate, the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC at the helm, a 13MP rear camera, an 8MP front camera, eight speakers, and a 13,000 mAh battery with support for 66W wired charging. The iQOO Pad6 Pro is being offered for CNY 4,499 ($660) with 8GB of RAM and 256GB of storage, CNY 4,999 ($733) with 12GB of RAM and 256GB of...
